Quick answer

Psyrri is best for Young travelers, Nightlife lovers, Creatives.

Psyrri is a artsy & alternative area with 4 tracked hotels averaging about €100/night. In this dataset, 0 hotels show an Acropolis-view signal and 2 hotels show a rooftop-bar signal. The lowest tracked nightly price signal is €80 at Athens Way Hotel.

Compare hotels Booking notes FAQs

About Psyrri

Former industrial area transformed into Athens' creative hub. Street art, indie bars, live music venues, and eclectic restaurants.

ArtsyNightlifeAlternative
Best for: Young travelers, Nightlife lovers, Creatives

What to Know Before Booking in Psyrri

Best-fit traveler

Psyrri works especially well for young travelers, nightlife lovers, creatives. If that is not your trip style, compare nearby alternatives before booking.

Price signal

The tracked Psyrri hotels average about €100 per night, with actual rates changing by date, room type, and cancellation policy.

Location signal

Psyrri is listed as 10-15 min from the Acropolis in this dataset. Confirm the exact hotel address and transit route before booking.

FAQs: Staying in Psyrri

Is Psyrri a good area to stay in Athens?

Yes. Psyrri is former industrial area transformed into athens' creative hub. It is especially useful for young travelers, nightlife lovers, creatives.

How far is Psyrri from the Acropolis?

Psyrri is 10-15 min walk from the Acropolis. Psyrri is listed as 10-15 min from the Acropolis in the Hotels of Athens neighborhood data. Exact walking time depends on the individual hotel address and entrance used.

What's the average hotel price in Psyrri?

Hotels in Psyrri average around €100 per night. Tracked hotels in Psyrri average around €100 per night, with the visible dataset spanning 4 options. Confirm live rates before booking.
